act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Seizure of goods and disposal thereof.—(1) If any person makes any
content:
84. Seizure of goods and disposal thereof.—(1) If any person makes any
supply or renders any service in violation of any provision of this Act or any rule made
thereunder, the Commissioner may, in the prescribed manner, seize and dispose of such
goods or the goods related to such service
(2) During the pendency of a proceeding, the Commissioner may, in such
manner and on such terms as may be prescribed, order for ad-interim
release of any good seized under sub-section (1) to the owner of such good
or his representative.

sub_sections.text:
If any person makes any
supply or renders any service in violation of any provision of this Act or any rule made
thereunder, the Commissioner may, in the prescribed manner, seize and dispose of such
goods or the goods related to such service

During the pendency of a proceeding, the Commissioner may, in such
manner and on such terms as may be prescribed, order for ad-interim
release of any good seized under sub-section (1) to the owner of such good
or his representative.
